divergence_summary: Incoming context said Lane_01 had already been assigned LANE01-LAWS-N7-N11-NTS-ESCALATION-V1.

Repo truth after sync showed that escalation completed at 6ddffaaa46b9b13619331edd0e85da641409f2c3 and was followed by NTS decision commit b7e72d82953a3771adf9c67430e6d829cfff7fc0, apply commit f10c885aa32cd2717d5f020a4602defdc984a3af, and checklist backfill commit cee6017adb9ce628b47c9554971680fea14a227d.
Current state, action board, and sync/acceptance manifests did not fully catch up to those newer repo events.

During the final sync/push window, repo truth advanced again with roadmap draft commit 7b820f50f5d6f1e28513bd17a20d24b8503e4c8f and checklist backfill 9d2762bcdaef03980ff59eb3919f96a3ad6d294f, so final repo truth now includes a DRAFT top-level roadmap pending NTS Gate 1.

current_system_identity.authority: NTS remains final authority; repo-backed law, amendment, report, snapshot, and audit evidence controls over chat context.
current_system_identity.gate: NTS_ROADMAP_GATE_1_DECISION_PENDING; LAW_N12, LAW_N13, AUTONOMY, DAEMON, BACKEND_MUTATION, AND APPLY-LIKE SIDE EFFECTS REMAIN NTS-GATED

draft_or_pending_items_remaining: roadmaps/AIER_CODE_V1_AUTOPILOT_ROADMAP.md now exists as a top-level DRAFT strategic document pending NTS Gate 1 approval.
Notification ledger and action board exist only as bootstrap visibility scaffolds.
No new pending SHARED amendment packets are present under docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/amendments/.

lane_status.next_action: Await NTS Gate 1 decision on the DRAFT roadmap or a revision dispatch.

blockers: Product repo path remains candidate-only and requires NTS confirmation before first real product task.

route_messages_ps1.notes: Supports inbox message status routing and unauthorized cross-lane response blocking.

aier_loop_ps1.notes: Supports DryRun loop execution, halt/resume detection, control ACKs, and audit logging; Apply mode exists in code but is not active authority.

roadmap_execution_boundary.notes: The roadmap proposes dispatcher, daemon, state sync, and later autonomy work, but active LAW_N8 and LAW_N11 boundaries still control until NTS Gate 1 and any future LAW_N12 or LAW_N13 approvals.

forbidden_until_nts_approval: Capability elevation without explicit NTS-gated evidence

copy_paste_pain_points: Task dispatch is still manual even though the task-context template is now active.
Handoff relay still depends on humans writing inbox/outbox markdown or JSON by hand.
Report relay is still manual because notifications are bootstrap-only and not kept current after major tasks.
Decision relay still requires human capture of NTS chat decisions into repo artifacts.
Status updates are fragmented across current_state, checklist, sync manifest, acceptance manifest, notification ledger, action board, and now a top-level roadmap, and those surfaces drift.
Prompt generation is not automated from checklist, current_state, lane capability, or evidence chains.
Evidence review is manual because reports and snapshots exist but no parser or summarizer surface is active.
GitHub sync verification is still copied manually into each task report.

ready_areas: Active governance base now includes LAW_N7-N11, Boot Minimum, Task Context Template, Document Stack Index, and runtime support procedures.
Repo-backed evidence surfaces exist: reports, snapshots, audit logs, inbox/outbox, NTS inbox, notifications scaffold, and self-testable runtime/governance scripts.
Lane_02 consumer scaffolding exists and can be progressed with a smoke task.
A top-level DRAFT roadmap now exists at roadmaps/AIER_CODE_V1_AUTOPILOT_ROADMAP.md, so planning can shift from blank-page authoring to review, gating, and sequencing.
blockers_and_prerequisites: The roadmap itself is DRAFT and pending NTS Gate 1 approval.
Roadmap Phase 1 and Phase 2 assume future LAW_N12 and LAW_N13 approvals before dispatcher, daemon, and audit-loop authority can expand.
runtime/current_state.md is stale after LAW_N7-N11 activation.
runtime/ACTION_REQUIRED_BOARD.md and notifications ledger are still bootstrap-only and do not reflect latest repo truth.
SYNC_MANIFEST.json and UNITON_SHARED_RUNTIME_ACCEPTANCE_MANIFEST.json are stale relative to lane folder and acceptance evidence.
LAW_N10 is active, but SHARED capability registry and Lane_01/Lane_03 capability files are missing.
Lane_02 smoke and product repo confirmation are still pending.
required_governance_gates: NTS Gate 1 approval of the DRAFT roadmap before roadmap execution begins
LAW_N10 capability checks before Class 2+ actions
LAW_N8 DryRun-first and no daemon/autonomy without NTS approval
LAW_N11 backend bridge remains ACTIVE as law but DRAFT_ONLY for execution

Task prompt generation and inbox/outbox assistance
Decision board and later controlled apply gates
